action.reasoning: Observation: Adaptive alpha=1.2 scored 0.8548 on 45 training maps vs 0.8095 for baseline. Analysis: Higher alpha works better - penalizes distance more, keeps robot local. Decision: Update predict.py with adaptive alpha=1.2, submit eval for official score, then test even higher alphas.
